root_text.sn22.65:1.2: Atha kho aññataro bhikkhu …pe… ekamantaṁ nisinno kho so bhikkhu bhagavantaṁ etadavoca:
root_text.sn22.65:1.3: “sādhu me, bhante, bhagavā saṅkhittena …pe… pahitatto vihareyyan”ti.
root_text.sn22.65:2.1: “Yathā kathaṁ pana tvaṁ, bhikkhu, mayā saṅkhittena bhāsitassa vitthārena atthaṁ ājānāsī”ti?
root_text.sn22.65:2.9: Imassa khvāhaṁ, bhante, bhagavatā saṅkhittena bhāsitassa evaṁ vitthārena atthaṁ ājānāmī”ti.
root_text.sn22.65:3.2: Sādhu kho tvaṁ, bhikkhu, mayā saṅkhittena bhāsitassa vitthārena atthaṁ ājānāsi.
root_text.sn22.65:3.3: Rūpaṁ kho, bhikkhu, abhinandamāno baddho mārassa;
root_text.sn22.65:3.10: Imassa kho, bhikkhu, mayā saṅkhittena bhāsitassa evaṁ vitthārena attho daṭṭhabbo”ti …pe…
root_text.sn22.65:3.11: aññataro ca pana so bhikkhu arahataṁ ahosīti.

translation_text.sn22.65:1.2: Then a mendicant went up to the Buddha … and asked him,
translation_text.sn22.65:1.3: “Sir, may the Buddha please teach me Dhamma in brief. When I’ve heard it, I’ll live alone, withdrawn, diligent, keen, and resolute.”
translation_text.sn22.65:1.4: “When you take pleasure, mendicant, you’re bound by Māra.
translation_text.sn22.65:1.5: Not taking pleasure, you’re free from the Wicked One.”
translation_text.sn22.65:2.1: “But how do you see the detailed meaning of my brief statement?”
translation_text.sn22.65:2.2: “Sir, when you take pleasure in form you’re bound by Māra.
translation_text.sn22.65:2.3: Not taking pleasure, you’re free from the Wicked One.
translation_text.sn22.65:2.4: When you take pleasure in feeling …
translation_text.sn22.65:2.8: Not taking pleasure, you’re free from the Wicked One.
translation_text.sn22.65:2.9: That’s how I understand the detailed meaning of the Buddha’s brief statement.”
translation_text.sn22.65:3.2: It’s good that you understand the detailed meaning of what I’ve said in brief like this.
translation_text.sn22.65:3.3: When you take pleasure in form you’re bound by Māra.
translation_text.sn22.65:3.4: Not taking pleasure, you’re free from the Wicked One.
translation_text.sn22.65:3.5: When you take pleasure in feeling …
translation_text.sn22.65:3.9: Not taking pleasure, you’re free from the Wicked One.
translation_text.sn22.65:3.10: This is how to understand the detailed meaning of what I said in brief.” …
translation_text.sn22.65:3.11: And that mendicant became one of the perfected.
